rationale: Real (legal) name of the nonprofit corporation filing the termination. The form's '(Real Name of Corporation)' caption distinguishes this from the assumed/fictitious name being terminated (Widget 2).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation intends to terminate the assumed or fictitious name of ___
rationale: The assumed/fictitious name being terminated. Same canonical key as CORP_ASUM-5 (the analogous registration form) — the value is the assumed-name string; the action (register vs terminate) is conveyed by the form context. Form title treats 'assumed' and 'fictitious' as synonyms in the §308-A nonprofit context.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___ (inline trailing blank, y≈401-420, right side)
rationale: Inline trailing blank ending the THIRD paragraph. Same multi-line registered_office.address_line{1,2} pattern as sister NP_MNPCA-11.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ___ (street, city, state and zip code) (wide line below, y≈378-400)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the THIRD paragraph for the registered office address (street, city, state and zip code).
Date the termination is signed (bottom-left, narrow widget).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer (right, y≈286-305)
rationale: First authorized officer's printed name and capacity. Shape D (combined name+capacity), per filing.signer_N.printed_name_and_capacity primitive established on sister NP_MNPCA-11. The (signature) lines themselves are wet-ink only and have no widget.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer (right, y≈219-240)
rationale: Second authorized officer's printed name and capacity. The form provides two signature slots (consistent with the dual-officer practice on §308-A nonprofit filings); the boilerplate footnote 'This document MUST be signed by any duly authorized officer' nominally requires only one, so the second slot is best-treated as recommended/optional rather than strictly required.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 — typically blank on a single-entity termination filing.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($5 base per page-0 header).

label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
